data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Effortlessly presents product options while minimizing decision paralysis.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Design ensures that clickable elements are adequately sized and properly positioned for ease of use.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: The site leverages familiar patterns ensuring users navigate intuitively.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Limits the amount of information presented at any time to improve comprehension.

data.title: The Law of Proximity
data.description: Arranges related content together for a coherent visual presentation.
